Talk With a Growth Partner IT Server Support & Hosting Maintenance FAQs Understanding White Label IT Services from E2M IT Server Support & Hosting Maintenance Capabilities Working with Your White Label IT Team Security and Reliability Getting Started with E2M Understanding White Label IT Services from E2M What are white label IT server support services? White label IT server support services let your agency offer server management, cloud support, and infrastructure maintenance under your own brand without hiring in-house IT experts. You partner with a white label company like E2M, and we handle the technical work while your business gets the credit. Here’s how it works. Your clients come to you for hosting support, server management, or infrastructure help. You own the relationship and service your customers, while our IT specialists handle the technical execution behind the scenes. The finished work shows up ready to present as your own. White labeling gives marketing agencies and web development shops the freedom to offer server support without hiring full-time server administrators. You keep control of pricing and client relationships. We handle configurations, migrations, monitoring, and troubleshooting to the standards you expect. Will my clients know I’m using a white label IT team? They won’t have a clue. E2M works as your invisible backend team, and every service we provide fits right in with your agency. We never reach out to your clients directly; all communication goes through you. Every report, documentation, and deliverable carries your agency’s branding. No E2M logo, and no mention of our company name on any client-facing materials. Our most effective agency partners set up a white label email address (something like it@youragency.com ) for our team to use when logging into hosting environments and support portals. That way, even system notifications look like they’re coming from your own staff. Your customers see a polished agency with serious IT capabilities. You get the credit, revenue, and the client loyalty. Do you sign an NDA to protect client information? We do, because protecting your clients and their data isn’t something we take lightly. NDAs come standard with every white label partnership with E2M. That means all server configurations, access credentials, client information, and proprietary business data stay confidential. Our company handles sensitive information carefully and has strict protocols about who sees what. Beyond the legal side, our whole business model depends on keeping things quiet. We’ve spent 13 years building a reputation as the white label partner that agencies trust with their most important client relationships. IT Server Support & Hosting Maintenance Capabilities What IT server support and hosting maintenance services does E2M offer? Our white label IT services cover everything agencies need to support their clients’ infrastructure: Server Management: Server setup and configuration, migrations between hosting providers, security hardening, performance optimization, and ongoing troubleshooting. Cloud Solutions: Full management across AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud, including implementation, migrations, Infrastructure as Code (Terraform), and container orchestration. Hosting Support: WHM/cPanel management and migrations, cloud hosting setup, and support across WP Engine, Kinsta, Cloudways, DigitalOcean, and more. Security & Compliance: Firewall configuration, DDoS protection, malware scanning and cleanup, vulnerability assessments, and support for HIPAA and PCI compliance requirements. Email Services: Email server configuration and migrations to Office 365 and Google Workspace. Monitoring & Maintenance: 24/7 uptime monitoring, automated backups, disaster recovery planning, plugin and core updates, and performance optimization. What hosting platforms do you support? We work within whatever cloud or web hosting environment your agency uses. Our team has deep experience with: AWS (EC2, RDS, S3, CloudFront, Route 53) WP Engine Kinsta Cloudways DigitalOcean HighLevel Google Cloud Azure And most other major providers We don’t provide hosting ourselves. We manage your clients’ sites within your existing infrastructure. You keep full control of hosting relationships and billing, which is usually how agencies prefer it. Does E2M handle cloud migrations? Yes. Cloud migrations are one of our core white label cloud services capabilities. We move workloads between providers or from on-premise infrastructure with minimal downtime. Our process starts with a test migration using a temporary domain. We identify potential issues before they affect your clients. If the migration requires downtime, we schedule it during low-traffic hours (typically midnight in your client’s time zone). We’ve handled AWS cloud migration, Azure cloud migration, Google Cloud migration, and most major hosting providers. Whether your client is moving from shared hosting to cloud infrastructure or switching between cloud providers, we manage the complexity so you don’t have to. Do you handle email migrations? Yes. We specialize in migrating emails across platforms like Microsoft Office 365 and Google Workspace. We can migrate any IMAP or POP3 server to Google or Microsoft. Email migrations require careful planning to avoid business disruption. We coordinate timing with your agency, handle DNS records, and verify everything works before cutting over. Your clients keep working while we handle the technical transition. Working with Your White Label IT Team Will I work with the same team on every project? We can’t promise the same individual will handle every task forever. People take vacations, get promoted, or move on. What we can promise is that your IT work will get done the way you want it, every time. Here’s how we make that happen. Your account manager coordinates all work and keeps track of your agency’s standards. A Technical Project Manager documents your preferences, client configurations, and hosting environments so any specialist can pick up where another left off. Our SOPs are detailed enough that the handoff is invisible to you. Over time, you’ll likely see the same faces because we try to keep teams consistent. But even when someone new steps in, our systems make sure they already know how you like things done. However, if there’s ever a need to change your Project Manager or Account Manager, we handle the handoff so you don’t miss a beat. Imagine if your agency lost a key PM tomorrow. You’d be scrambling to recruit, hire, and train a replacement. We ensure that never happens to you by keeping things seamless. How quickly can I onboard my white label IT team? Once you sign up and do the onboarding call, we start within 24-48 hours. During that first call, we learn about your agency, your typical hosting environments, what tools you use, and how you like to communicate. Then we get access set up, and you can assign your first task the same day. No long contracts. No complicated procurement hoops. E2M keeps capacity available so we can launch new white label partnerships quickly and handle busy periods for existing partners. What hours does your IT team work? Our team works on Indian Standard Time, with project managers available until 11 AM to 12 PM Eastern for overlap with North American agencies. This creates a productive rhythm. Submit tasks and provide context when it’s morning for you. Our specialists work while you focus on client relationships. By the next morning, the work will be ready for your review. For 24/7 monitoring, our systems never sleep. If a client’s site goes down at 3 AM, our monitoring catches it, and our team responds. For real-time collaboration, we use Google Chat for quick questions and Slack or Microsoft Teams if that’s what your agency prefers. How do you handle emergencies and after-hours issues? Our monitoring systems alert us immediately when something goes wrong. If any of your clients’ websites go down, our technicians address the issue as quickly as possible. For agencies on our Pro and Advanced plans, you get real-time communication channels for urgent situations. We understand that server issues don’t wait for business hours, and we’ve built our operations to respond accordingly. Will you get on calls with my clients? No. We stay off client calls because that’s your relationship to own. E2M works as your invisible backend. We handle the technical execution. You handle the client conversations, strategy discussions, and relationship building. Your clients see you as the expert with serious IT capabilities. If you need technical input for a client call, send us the questions beforehand. We’ll give you the answers, talking points, or documentation you need to sound like you have a full IT department on staff. Will you work within my agency’s processes and systems? Absolutely. Set up a white label email address, add it to your hosting dashboards and monitoring tools, give us the logins, and we slot right in like part of your in-house IT team. E2M adapts to how you work: Project tools: Asana, Monday.com, ClickUp Basecamp, Teamwork, Trello Jira, Zoho, Notion, Airtable Communication: Google Chat (our default for real-time questions) Microsoft Teams, Slack, Email Hosting environments: Your clients’ hosting providers Your staging and production setups Your monitoring and backup systems We learn your processes and fit into your existing systems to create a smooth workflow. Security and Reliability How do you ensure server security? Security runs through everything we do. We configure firewalls, implement DDoS protection, and stay current with security tools like AWS WAF, Sucuri, and Cloudflare. For credential management, we use LastPass with two-factor authentication to share login details within our internal team. We regularly audit access logs to ensure proper security hygiene. Our proactive approach means we catch and address vulnerabilities before they become problems. Regular security patches, plugin updates, and configuration reviews keep your clients’ infrastructure protected. What’s your SLA for uptime and response times? We commit to 99.99% uptime for infrastructure we manage. For issue response, we typically respond within 2-4 hours during business hours, and our monitoring systems trigger immediate alerts for critical issues regardless of time. Different situations call for different response levels. A plugin update request might take 24 hours. A site outage triggers an immediate response. We set clear expectations with your agency so you can confidently communicate with your clients. What backup solutions do you offer? We provide various backup solutions depending on server types and your preferences. Common options include AWS S3, Dropbox, and provider-specific backup systems. Our approach includes automated backup scheduling, multi-region redundancy for critical sites, and disaster recovery planning. We test backups regularly to ensure they actually work when you need them, because a backup you can’t restore isn’t really a backup. Do you support HIPAA, PCI, and SOC 2 compliance? Yes. We have experience supporting agencies whose clients operate in regulated industries. We provide guidance on HIPAA, PCI, and SOC 2 compliance requirements and can implement configurations that meet those standards. However, we’re IT specialists, not compliance auditors. We handle the technical implementation, but your clients should work with qualified compliance professionals for formal assessments and certifications. Getting Started with E2M Are all hours paid for upfront? Yes. All plans get paid before work starts. This keeps things simple. You know exactly what you’re investing each month for IT support. No surprise invoices, and we can dedicate resources to your account, knowing the commitment is solid. Our plans include unlimited maintenance and support tasks within your plan hours. Submit as many requests as your allocation covers without stressing about per-task fees. Predictable pricing makes it easy to set rates for your clients and forecast your business finances. What happens if I run out of hours mid-month? Not a problem. You can add hours at any point in the month. We’ll let you know when you’re approaching your limit so you can plan accordingly. If your pipeline varies seasonally, our month-to-month model lets you adjust. Heavy month coming up? Add hours. Things slowing down? Scale back. Your IT support investment matches your actual needs. What happens if my pipeline slows down? No problem. Simply let your account manager know you’d like to pause your plan. Once your pipeline fills up again, you can resume the hours. We’d rather have you pause and come back than lock you into hours you don’t need. That flexibility is part of why agencies stick with us. 98% client retention over 13+ years. How does white label IT pricing compare to hiring in-house? White label IT partnerships typically cost 50-70% less than building the same capability in-house. You skip recruitment costs, benefits, training, and all the overhead that comes with running an IT department. E2M charges a flat monthly rate, which means no surprises. You know what you’re spending, which makes it easy to price profitably. What in-house costs look like (US-based): Senior DevOps engineer: $130,000+/year Systems administrator: $90,000+/year Security specialist: $110,000+/year Benefits and software: $40,000+/year Total: $370,000+ per year for a basic team What you get with E2M’s white label IT server support and hosting maintenance services: Full team access at a fraction of in-house cost No recruiting or turnover headaches Dial IT capacity up or down as needed 24/7 monitoring included Many of our clients tell us that white labelling improved their margins while helping them serve more clients, and that the money they saved went back into sales and marketing to grow their agency. What makes E2M different from other white label IT Service providers? Three things set us apart: 13+ years of White Label Partnership experience with agencies. We’ve supported over 1,100 agencies with web development and digital marketing. We understand agency workflows, client expectations, and the pressure to deliver. Our services are built for how agencies actually operate. Proactive communication. We flag issues before they become problems, keep you updated without you having to chase us, and integrate with your workflows so working with us feels easy. You won’t wonder what’s happening with your projects. Full-service White Label partnership. We’re not just a white label IT server &  hosting maintenance provider. E2M Solutions also offers white label website development, SEO/ AI SEO services, eCommerce solutions, content writing, PPC, and AI consulting services. When your clients need more than infrastructure support, we can help—all under your agency’s name. Why should I choose a white label IT partner instead of building in-house? Building an in-house team in a server maintenance company is expensive, slow, and risky for most agencies. Finding qualified DevOps engineers and systems administrators takes months. Training them on your clients’ environments takes more time. And there’s always the chance they leave for a better offer. White labelling with E2M gives you specialized infrastructure support across server management, cloud platforms, security, and monitoring without that overhead. You keep control of client relationships. We handle execution behind the scenes. Your agency’s capabilities grow fast, and you can scale based on actual demand. Agencies choose E2M as their white label IT partner because they can finally say yes to infrastructure work they used to turn down, without the risk of full-time hires they might not need six months from now. What makes E2M a trusted partner for agencies seeking white label IT server support and hosting maintenance services? 13+ years working with agencies across the globe, mostly in the US, Canada, the UK, and Australia, but also in countries as varied as New Zealand, Ireland, and Dubai. A team of 300+ specialists, including IT engineers, DevOps professionals, and project managers, all focused on your agency’s success. We understand agency life: the pressure to deliver on time, the need to protect margins, and the importance of looking good for clients who are counting on you. That’s why our white label services help your agency expand IT capabilities and take on more infrastructure work without hiring full-time specialists or compromising quality. When you work with E2M, you get people who understand what’s on the line and genuinely care about your success. How do I get started with E2M’s white label services? Talk to a Growth Partner . We’ll learn about your agency, discuss your IT server support and hosting maintenance needs, and figure out the right plan for your business. No long-term contracts. Cancel whenever if it’s not working out. Most agencies start small to test quality, then add more as they see the results. During onboarding: We learn your standards and client configurations Set up access to your hosting environments and tools Assign your dedicated white label team Launch your first task within 24-48 hours Whether you want to expand capacity, add services for clients, or find a partner who handles infrastructure so you can focus on growth, E2M is ready to support your agency. Absolutely, you can pay by ACH. Just reach out to info@e2msolutions.com and let us know. You can also sign up for your first month using a credit card, and then switch to ACH or wire with help from your Account Manager. Can I set up automatic payment? Definitely. Just clarify with your account manager that you’d like to set up autopay and we’ll bill your account on the 1st of every month. Otherwise, your Account Manager will confirm with you before each charge. Is my payment information secure? Yes. All payments are processed through secure, PCI-compliant payment processors. We never store your full card details on our servers. What’s included in my plan hours? Your hours cover all project work, such as design, development, revisions, communication, and quality assurance. There are no hidden fees or surprise charges. Do unused hours roll over? Hours don’t roll over month to month. But if your workload shifts, you can scale your plan down and still keep the hours you didn’t use. Your Account Manager will make sure you’re getting the most out of your hours and that your plan fits your actual needs. What happens if I run out of hours in the middle of the month? Not a problem. Simply let your account manager know you’d like to re-up on hours with an early renewal. Commitment & Flexibility When does my plan start? Your plan activates immediately after checkout. You’ll receive an onboarding email within a few hours, and we can typically begin work within 24-48 hours. What is the cancellation policy? You can cancel your plan at any time. However, we do not provide refunds for any unused hours. What if I need to pause my plan? Not a problem. Let your account manager know you’d like to pause, and we’ll hold your plan. When your pipeline fills back up, you can resume without penalty. Can I change my plan later? Absolutely. You can upgrade, downgrade, or adjust your plan at any time. Just let your account manager know what you need, and we’ll make the change effective on your next billing cycle. Getting Started How quickly can we get started? Most agencies submit their first project within 24-48 hours of signing up. We’ll schedule an onboarding call to learn your preferences, set up tool access, and align on communication. What do I need to provide to get started? Just your preferred project management tools, communication preferences, and any brand guidelines or standards you’d like us to follow. We’ll handle the rest. Will I have a dedicated point of contact? Yes. You’ll be assigned a dedicated account manager and project manager who will know your agency, your clients, and your standards. Trust & Confidentiality Will you sign an NDA? NDAs come standard with every partnership. All project details, client information, and deliverables remain confidential. Do I own all the work you produce? 100%. Every file, design, and line of code we produce belongs to you. No hidden clauses, no licensing fees. We’ll get your explicit approval before using any 3rd party tools that require licensing fees or subscriptions. In most cases, you will contract directly with those third parties so that there are no issues with E2M dependencies after launch. Will my clients know I’m using a white label team? Never. We work as your invisible backend white label team. We never contact your clients directly, and all deliverables are branded as your agency’s work. × Hi, Khushbu here Let's connect! Absolutely, you can pay by ACH. Just reach out to info@e2msolutions.com and let us know. You can also sign up for your first month using a credit card, and then switch to ACH or wire with help from your Account Manager. Can I set up automatic payment? Definitely. Just clarify with your account manager that you’d like to set up autopay and we’ll bill your account on the 1st of every month. Otherwise, your Account Manager will confirm with you before each charge. Is my payment information secure? Yes. All payments are processed through secure, PCI-compliant payment processors. We never store your full card details on our servers. What’s included in my plan hours? Your hours cover all project work, such as design, development, revisions, communication, and quality assurance. There are no hidden fees or surprise charges. Do unused hours roll over? Hours don’t roll over month to month. But if your workload shifts, you can scale your plan down and still keep the hours you didn’t use. Your Account Manager will make sure you’re getting the most out of your hours and that your plan fits your actual needs. What happens if I run out of hours in the middle of the month? Not a problem. Simply let your account manager know you’d like to re-up on hours with an early renewal. Commitment & Flexibility When does my plan start? Your plan activates immediately after checkout. You’ll receive an onboarding email within a few hours, and we can typically begin work within 24-48 hours. What is the cancellation policy? You can cancel your plan at any time. However, we do not provide refunds for any unused hours. What if I need to pause my plan? Not a problem. Let your account manager know you’d like to pause, and we’ll hold your plan. When your pipeline fills back up, you can resume without penalty. Can I change my plan later? Absolutely. You can upgrade, downgrade, or adjust your plan at any time. Just let your account manager know what you need, and we’ll make the change effective on your next billing cycle. Getting Started How quickly can we get started? Most agencies submit their first project within 24-48 hours of signing up. We’ll schedule an onboarding call to learn your preferences, set up tool access, and align on communication. What do I need to provide to get started? Just your preferred project management tools, communication preferences, and any brand guidelines or standards you’d like us to follow. We’ll handle the rest. Will I have a dedicated point of contact? Yes. You’ll be assigned a dedicated account manager and project manager who will know your agency, your clients, and your standards. Trust & Confidentiality Will you sign an NDA? NDAs come standard with every partnership. All project details, client information, and deliverables remain confidential. Do I own all the work you produce? 100%. Every file, design, and line of code we produce belongs to you. No hidden clauses, no licensing fees. We’ll get your explicit approval before using any 3rd party tools that require licensing fees or subscriptions. In most cases, you will contract directly with those third parties so that there are no issues with E2M dependencies after launch. Will my clients know I’m using a white label team? Never. We work as your invisible backend white label team. We never contact your clients directly, and all deliverables are branded as your agency’s work. × Hi, Khushbu here Let's connect! Digital Agency · Los Angeles, USA White Label Social Video Editing FAQs Understanding White Label Video Editing Services Video Editing Services and Capabilities Working with Your White Label Video Team Quality and Security Getting Started with E2M Understanding White Label Video Editing Services What are white label video editing services? White label video editing services let your agency offer social video production under your own brand without hiring an in-house editing team. You partner with a white label company like E2M, and we edit videos while your business gets the credit. Here’s how it works. Your clients come to you for social media content. You own the relationship and service your customers, while our video editing team transforms raw footage into polished, platform-ready content behind the scenes. The finished videos show up ready to present as your own agency’s work. What is the best white label video editing service for agencies? The best white label video editing service for agencies offers consistent quality, fast turnaround, and seamless integration into your workflow. E2M provides dedicated editors, predictable pricing, and scalable delivery without requiring in-house hiring. How do I outsource video editing for my agency? You can outsource video editing by partnering with a white label provider like E2M. You manage client communication and strategy, while the editing team handles production, delivery, and revisions behind the scenes. Will my clients know I’m using a white label video team? No. E2M operates as your invisible backend partner. We never communicate with your clients or add our branding to deliverables. Everything is delivered under your agency’s name. Video Editing Services and Capabilities What video editing services does E2M offer? Our white label video editing services cover everything agencies need to deliver high-quality social video content: Short-Form Video Editing: Reels, Shorts, TikTok, and LinkedIn clips edited for maximum engagement. Hook optimization, pacing, and cuts that keep viewers watching. Long-Form Video Repurposing: Transform webinars, podcasts, and YouTube videos into dozens of platform-ready clips. Maximize content ROI without extra shoots. Paid Media Video Editing: Ads that convert. Video creatives optimized for Meta, YouTube, LinkedIn, and TikTok ad placements. Captions & Subtitles: Styled, spell-checked captions that boost accessibility and watch time. Formatted for every platform. Platform Formatting: Aspect ratio optimization for Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, LinkedIn, and more. Thumbnails: Eye-catching thumbnail designs that drive clicks and match your client’s brand. Motion Graphics: Animated text, lower thirds, transitions, and branded overlays. Visual Enhancement: Color correction, color grading, and visual polish that elevates raw footage. Intro & Outro Templates: Consistent branded openings and closings for every piece of content. What platforms do you optimize video for? We edit and format video for every major social platform: Instagram Reels TikTok YouTube Shorts LinkedIn Video Facebook YouTube Twitter/X One shoot can become content for every platform. We handle the reformatting, reframing, and optimization so your clients show up everywhere without extra production costs Do you offer long-form video or just short-form content? Yes. While short-form social content is our specialty, we also handle long-form video repurposing. That means taking a 60-minute webinar, podcast episode, or YouTube video and cutting it into dozens of short-form clips optimized for social. This repurposing service is incredibly valuable for agencies with clients who create long-form content but struggle to maintain a consistent social presence. One piece of source material becomes weeks of content across every platform. What Video file formats do you accept? We accept most standard formats, including MP4, MOV, AVI, and more. We also work with camera RAW and LOG files for clients who need professional color grading. If you’re not sure whether we can work with your footage, just ask. Do you provide stock footage or music? Yes. Stock footage and royalty-free music are included in our plans. If a project needs b-roll or background music to fill gaps or enhance the edit, we’ve got you covered at no extra charge. Working with Your White Label Video Team How quickly can I onboard my white label video team? Once you sign up and do the onboarding call, we can start within 24-48 hours. Often, tasks can be assigned the same day. During that first call, we learn about your agency, your typical video projects, what tools you use, and how you like to communicate. Then we get access set up and launch your first project. No long-term contracts. No complicated procurement hoops. E2M keeps capacity available so we can launch new white label video partnerships quickly and handle busy periods for existing partners. What’s the turnaround time for video edits? First drafts typically arrive in 1-3 days, depending on complexity. Simple short-form edits often come back within 24-48 hours. More complex projects with motion graphics or extensive color grading may take a bit longer. We’ll give you a clear timeline before starting so you can set expectations with your clients. No surprises on either end. How many revisions are included? Unlimited revisions are included in all plans. We work until it’s right. You review, send consolidated feedback, and our editors make changes quickly and professionally. The goal is efficient revisions so you can keep client relationships strong without drowning in back-and-forth. Will I work with the same Video editors Team on every project? Yes. That’s why we assign dedicated people to each agency partner. You won’t have to re-explain your preferences or brand standards on every project. Our editors pick up on your agency’s style and what your clients expect. Here’s how it works: You’ll have a dedicated Project Manager as a single point of contact. That PM then manages the editing team according to our high standards and attention to detail. Documentation, training, and precise adherence to SOPs take care of the rest; your work will get done the way you want it, even if team members change. And if there’s ever a need to change your Project Manager, we handle the handoff so you don’t miss a beat. Imagine if your agency lost a key PM tomorrow. You’d be scrambling to recruit, hire, and train a replacement. We ensure that never happens to you by keeping things seamless. Will you work within my agency’s processes and systems? Absolutely. We adapt to how you work: Project tools: Asana, Monday.com, ClickUp Basecamp, Teamwork, Trello Jira, Zoho, Notion, Airtable Communication: Microsoft Teams, Slack, Email, Google Chat File sharing: Google Drive, Dropbox, Frame.io WeTransfer, or your preferred method You don’t have to change how you operate to work with a white label video partner. We learn your processes and fit into your existing systems. Quality and Security How do you ensure quality in video content? Quality assurance runs through every stage of what we do. Our editors follow detailed brand guidelines, check spelling on all captions, and review every edit before delivery. Before anything reaches you, it goes through internal review. The result is polished video content that makes your agency look good and meets client expectations consistently. How do you ensure the security of client footage? We take security seriously. We use encrypted file transfers and secure storage for all client footage. Access is limited to team members assigned to your account, and we follow strict protocols for handling sensitive content. All footage is deleted according to your preferences after project completion. NDAs come standard, and we’re happy to accommodate any additional security requirements your clients may have. Getting Started with E2M How does white label video Editors team pricing compare to hiring in-house? White label video editing partnerships usually cost 40-60% less than building the same capability in-house. You skip recruitment costs, software licenses, equipment, benefits, training, and all the overhead that comes with running an internal video team. We provide creative recommendations, not just task fulfillment. We adapt to your tools and processes. These aren’t marketing lines we put on the website. They’re the reason we maintain 98% client retention and have served 1100+ agencies over the years. Why do agencies choose white label video over building an in-house team? Building in-house is expensive, slow, and risky for most agencies. Finding a full-time video editor with the right skills takes months. Training them on different client brands takes more time. Absolutely, you can pay by ACH. Just reach out to info@e2msolutions.com and let us know. You can also sign up for your first month using a credit card, and then switch to ACH or wire with help from your Account Manager. Can I set up automatic payment? Definitely. Your hours cover all project work, such as design, development, revisions, communication, and quality assurance. There are no hidden fees or surprise charges. Do unused hours roll over? Your Account Manager will make sure you’re getting the most out of your hours and that your plan fits your actual needs. What happens if I run out of hours in the middle of the month? Not a problem. Do I own all the work you produce? 100%. Every file, design, and line of code we produce belongs to you. No hidden clauses, no licensing fees. We’ll get your explicit approval before using any 3rd party tools that require licensing fees or subscriptions. In most cases, you will contract directly with those third parties so that there are no issues with E2M dependencies after launch. Will my clients know I’m using a white label team? Never. Absolutely, you can pay by ACH. Just reach out to info@e2msolutions.com and let us know. You can also sign up for your first month using a credit card, and then switch to ACH or wire with help from your Account Manager. Can I set up automatic payment? Definitely. Just clarify with your account manager that you’d like to set up autopay and we’ll bill your account on the 1st of every month. Otherwise, your Account Manager will confirm with you before each charge. Is my payment information secure? Yes. All payments are processed through secure, PCI-compliant payment processors. We never store your full card details on our servers. What’s included in my plan hours? Your hours cover all project work, such as design, development, revisions, communication, and quality assurance. There are no hidden fees or surprise charges. Do unused hours roll over? Hours don’t roll over month to month. But if your workload shifts, you can scale your plan down and still keep the hours you didn’t use. Your Account Manager will make sure you’re getting the most out of your hours and that your plan fits your actual needs. What happens if I run out of hours in the middle of the month? Not a problem. Simply let your account manager know you’d like to re-up on hours with an early renewal. Commitment & Flexibility When does my plan start? Your plan activates immediately after checkout. You’ll receive an onboarding email within a few hours, and we can typically begin work within 24-48 hours. What is the cancellation policy? You can cancel your plan at any time. However, we do not provide refunds for any unused hours. What if I need to pause my plan? Not a problem. Let your account manager know you’d like to pause, and we’ll hold your plan. When your pipeline fills back up, you can resume without penalty. Can I change my plan later? Absolutely. You can upgrade, downgrade, or adjust your plan at any time. Just let your account manager know what you need, and we’ll make the change effective on your next billing cycle. Getting Started How quickly can we get started? Most agencies submit their first project within 24-48 hours of signing up. We’ll schedule an onboarding call to learn your preferences, set up tool access, and align on communication. What do I need to provide to get started? Just your preferred project management tools, communication preferences, and any brand guidelines or standards you’d like us to follow. We’ll handle the rest. Will I have a dedicated point of contact? Yes. You’ll be assigned a dedicated account manager and project manager who will know your agency, your clients, and your standards. Trust & Confidentiality Will you sign an NDA? NDAs come standard with every partnership. All project details, client information, and deliverables remain confidential. Do I own all the work you produce? 100%. Every file, design, and line of code we produce belongs to you. No hidden clauses, no licensing fees. We’ll get your explicit approval before using any 3rd party tools that require licensing fees or subscriptions. In most cases, you will contract directly with those third parties so that there are no issues with E2M dependencies after launch. Will my clients know I’m using a white label team? Never. We work as your invisible backend white label team. We never contact your clients directly, and all deliverables are branded as your agency’s work. × Hi, Khushbu here Let's connect! Web Design & Support Company · Florida, USA FAQs About Our White Label Digital Marketing Services Understanding White Label Digital Marketing Why Agencies Choose White Label Digital Marketing Working with Your White Label Digital Marketing Team E2M Services and Capabilities Getting Started with E2M Understanding White Label Digital Marketing What are white label digital marketing agency services? White label digital marketing services let your agency offer SEO , content , PPC , AI search and other online marketing under your own brand without building internal teams. You partner with a white label partner like E2M, and we handle strategy and execution behind the scenes. Your clients see polished work from your agency. You get the credit, the margins, and the client loyalty. Your clients come to you for marketing support. You own the relationship and set your pricing. Our white label team creates deliverables (SEO audits, content strategies, ad campaigns, white label reports) while your company gets the credit. The finished work shows up ready to present as your own. This model works for marketing agencies at every stage. Boutique shops use white label services to offer a complete suite of services without hiring specialists. Established agencies use it to handle overflow and gain access to expertise they don’t have in-house. Growing agencies use it to scale without the risk and overhead costs of full-time hires. White label marketing solutions give you the freedom to expand your service offerings, attract more clients, and grow. You keep control of client relationships and pricing. We handle execution to the standards you expect. What’s the difference between white label marketing and traditional outsourcing? Traditional outsourcing usually means hiring freelancers or offshore teams for task-based work. You manage the relationship, chase deadlines, and hope the quality holds up. There’s often no strategic thinking involved. Just execution on whatever you hand over. White label marketing is a different model. A white label digital marketing agency like E2M becomes your invisible backend team. We handle strategy, execution, and reporting as if we were part of your company. Your clients never know we exist. All deliverables go out under your brand identity with your company name on everything. The practical differences matter. Traditional outsourcing means managing multiple freelancers, dealing with inconsistent quality, and spending time coordinating work. E2M’s white label services provide a dedicated team, established processes, predictable quality, and direct communication through a single point of contact. Traditional outsourcing often comes with hourly billing that’s hard to predict. And where other white labels might offer project pricing or campaign pricing that quickly spins out of control, E2M offers flat monthly pricing that helps you protect your profit margins and price your offerings profitably. Traditional outsourcing rarely includes strategic support. A good white label marketing agency provides recommendations, identifies opportunities, and helps you deliver better client results. Not just complete tasks. Many agencies have been burned by freelancers who disappear mid-project or deliver work that doesn’t meet standards. A white label digital marketing company with a track record (E2M has 13+ years and 98% client retention) provides the reliability that protects your reputation. Will my clients know I’m using a white label agency? They won’t have a clue. E2M works as your invisible backend team, and every piece of work we create fits right in with your agency and brand identity. We never contact your clients directly. All communication goes through you. We don’t put our company name or logo on any deliverables, documents, or white label reports. Everything we produce goes out under your brand. Our most effective agency partners set up a white label email address (e.g., marketing@youragency.com ) for our white label team to use when logging into client accounts and tools. That way, even backend activity looks like it’s coming from your staff. Your clients see a polished agency with serious capabilities. You get the credit and the customer loyalty. This level of confidentiality is standard for the best white label agencies. Your clients see you as the expert delivering results. We stay invisible. Do you sign an NDA to protect client information? Yes. NDAs come standard with every white label agency partnership. All project details, client information, and data stay confidential. We’ve spent 13 years building a reputation as the white label digital marketing agency other agencies trust with their most important client relationships. Beyond the legal side, our whole model depends on keeping things quiet. We will never share or post your client work as our own. Your clients’ information stays protected, and your competitive advantage stays intact. What types of services can be white labeled? E2M offers white label digital marketing across the services that agencies need most: SEO Services: Technical SEO audits, on-page optimization, keyword research, local SEO, link building guidance, Google Business Profile optimization, schema implementation, search engine optimization for AI platforms, and white label SEO services. We help your clients rank in traditional search and get cited in AI-powered platforms like ChatGPT and Perplexity. Content Marketing: Blog writing, pillar pages, topic clusters, whitepapers, ebooks, website copywriting, landing page copy, and email marketing copy. Our US-based writers produce content that builds authority and drives organic traffic for your clients. Social Video Services: Video scripts, social video and paid media editing, short-form video captions, motion graphics for social content, and social video remastering and repurposing. PPC Services: Google Ads management, Meta Ads (Facebook and Instagram), LinkedIn Ads, and Local Service Ads. Campaign setup, daily optimization, conversion tracking, A/B testing, and white label reporting. You stay focused on client relationships while we handle the daily grind of bid management. But unlike some other providers, we also offer web design and development for WordPress, Shopify, WooCommerce, Webflow, and other platforms. This means you can offer a complete solution to your clients without hiring specialists for each area. Many marketing agencies start with a single offering to test quality, then expand their white label marketing agency partnership as they see results. Why Agencies Choose White Label Digital Marketing How can white label digital marketing help my agency scale? Capacity is usually what holds agencies back. You land new clients, then scramble to deliver. You turn down projects because you don’t have the bandwidth. You burn out your team trying to do everything in-house. White label digital marketing fixes that. Instead of turning down projects or hiring when things get busy, you expand your capabilities immediately by using our team. Think about the money. A single experienced US-based SEO specialist can run $80,000 to $120,000 a year plus benefits. A PPC manager costs close to the same. A content team? Even more. With E2M as your white label partner, you get a full team of marketing experts (SEO specialists, content writers, PPC managers, and project managers) for a flat monthly rate. Many agencies save 40-60% over hiring in-house while serving more clients at the same time. The overhead costs disappear. No recruiting, no benefits, no training, no turnover headaches. This model works especially well for marketing agencies at a turning point. Maybe you’re trying to land bigger clients who need serious capabilities. Your team stops drowning in execution and starts working on high-value activities. The math is straightforward. If a white label partnership costs $5,000/month and lets you take on $15,000 in additional client work (while saving $8,000 in hiring costs), the ROI is clear. Our white label SEO services cover everything marketing agencies need to help clients rank in traditional search and AI-powered platforms: Technical SEO: Site audits, crawlability analysis, Core Web Vitals optimization, site speed improvements, schema implementation, and technical fixes that improve search engine optimization performance. On-Page Optimization: Keyword research, content optimization, meta tags, internal linking strategies, and on-page SEO work that helps pages rank for target keywords and reach the right target audience. Local SEO: Google Business Profile optimization, local citation building, review management strategies, and local search marketing services for clients with physical locations or service areas. Link Building: Outreach strategies, link building guidance, and backlink analysis to build domain authority and improve rankings. AI Search Optimization: Optimization for AI Overviews, ChatGPT citations, Perplexity, and other AI-powered search platforms. Community Bank Marketing Agency · Mississippi, USA FAQs About our White Label GA4/GTM Services What is a white label GA4 and GTM service for agencies? A white-label GA4 and GTM service means an external team handles all Google Analytics 4 and Google Tag Manager setup, configuration, and ongoing management under your agency’s brand. Your clients never know E2M is involved. You take the credit, retain the relationship, and earn the margin. How quickly can E2M set up GA4 and GTM for my clients? Standard tracking setups and audits are delivered within 24 to 48 hours of receiving project requirements. More complex implementations, such as custom ecommerce tracking or multi-platform integrations, are scoped upfront so you have a clear delivery timeline before work begins. Will my clients know E2M is managing their GA4 and GTM? No. All deliverables, documentation, reports, and dashboards reflect your agency’s branding.E2M operates entirely behind the scenes. We never contact your clients directly, and we never reference our involvement in any client-facing material. Can E2M fix broken GA4 and GTM setups that were configured incorrectly? Yes. Fixing broken or incomplete tracking configurations is one of our most common engagements. Our audit identifies every issue, duplicate events, missing conversions, misconfigured data layers, and our team corrects them systematically with a full audit report and corrected implementation. Do you support ecommerce tracking on Shopify and WooCommerce? Yes. E2M supports enhanced ecommerce tracking for Shopify, WooCommerce, BigCommerce, and Magento including full funnel tracking from product impressions through to purchase, custom data layer documentation, and platform-specific GTM configurations. Is there a minimum contract or commitment required? No.E2M operates month-to-month with no contracts, no minimums, and no retainers. Choose the plan that fits your current workload and adjust as your agency’s needs change. What makes E2M different from hiring a freelance GA4 specialist? Freelancers create delivery risk when they disappear or go offline; your clients’ projects stall. E2M provides institutional reliability: documented SOPs, dedicated account managers, team redundancy, and consistent delivery standards. You’re partnering with a system, not a single person. Are your GA4 and GTM setups GDPR and CCPA compliant? Yes. Every E2M implementation is built with GDPR, CCPA, and Google Consent Mode v2 in mind,  including consent-based data collection, cookieless measurement fallbacks, and proper event filtering so your clients’ data practices remain legally sound. Can E2M integrate GA4 with Google Ads, Meta Ads, and other platforms? Yes. Multi-platform tracking is a core service. We configure Google Ads conversion tracking, Facebook Pixel and Conversions API, LinkedIn and TikTok event tracking, and map all events so your clients’ paid and organic performance feeds into a unified reporting view. Do you provide training for my agency team on GA4 setups you deliver? Yes. E2M provides onboarding documentation and training support to help your team understand our implementations. Advanced plan partners can request walkthrough sessions with their dedicated web analyst during scheduled progress calls. Ready to Get Started? Creative Agency · Oregon, USA FAQs White Label WordPress Maintenance What are white label WordPress maintenance and support services? White label WordPress maintenance and support services allow your agency to offer ongoing website updates, fixes, and optimization under your brand without hiring an in-house team. Your clients work directly with you, while E2M handles updates, security, performance, and support behind the scenes so you deliver consistent results without operational overhead. Will my clients know I’m using a white label WordPress support partner? No. E2M works as your invisible backend team. We never communicate directly with your clients. All deliverables, updates, and reporting are shared under your brand. Many agencies even set up branded support emails (like support@youragency.com) for a seamless experience. How is E2M different from other WordPress maintenance companies? Hiring and managing developers is expensive and slow. A mid-level WordPress developer can cost $40K–$120K/year in the US, excluding benefits and overhead. With WordPress maintenance outsourcing, agencies get: Immediate access to a full team No hiring, training, or retention challenges Flexible scaling based on workload This is why outsourcing has become the preferred model for agencies focused on growth. What WordPress maintenance services does E2M offer? Our WordPress maintenance services cover everything needed to keep websites secure, fast, and functional: Core, plugin, and theme updates Security monitoring and malware protection Performance optimization and Core Web Vitals improvements Website backups and recovery Troubleshooting and bug fixes Technical SEO and tracking setup Everything is handled under one roof, so your agency avoids managing multiple vendors. Do you provide white label WordPress support for daily tasks? Yes. Our white label WordPress support services include unlimited edits, updates, and ongoing fixes. This is critical for agencies managing multiple clients, where small requests can consume 30–40% of internal team time if not outsourced. Do you offer WordPress emergency support? Yes. We provide WordPress emergency support for issues like downtime, broken functionality, or security incidents. Our team responds quickly to restore functionality and minimize client impact because even a few hours of downtime can affect revenue and trust. Can you support agencies using WordPress maintenance outsourcing? Absolutely. E2M is built for agencies using White label WordPress maintenance outsourcing to scale. We act as your backend delivery team, helping you: Take on more clients Maintain consistent quality Deliver faster turnaround times How quickly can your team start working on my WordPress maintenance tasks? We typically onboard and start within 24–48 hours. After onboarding, tasks can be assigned immediately, and many agencies start seeing turnaround within the same day depending on scope. Will I get a dedicated team for WordPress support? Yes. You’ll work with a dedicated Project Manager and WordPress support team. This ensures: Consistent quality Faster turnaround Better understanding of your clients and workflows Do you work within our agency’s tools and processes? Yes. We integrate directly into your systems—ClickUp, Asana, Slack, Trello, or others. How do you ensure WordPress website security? We follow a proactive approach to WordPress security: Regular updates and patching Malware scanning and removal Firewall and WAF setup Login and access hardening With WordPress powering over 40% of all websites globally, it’s a common target making proactive security essential. Do you provide backups and recovery solutions? Yes. We manage automated backups and fast recovery systems. Best practices include: Daily or real-time backups Off-site storage Regular recovery testing This ensures websites can be restored quickly in case of issues. Do your services help improve SEO and performance? Yes. Our maintenance includes: Core Web Vitals optimization Page speed improvements Technical SEO fixes Tracking and analytics setup Fast, optimized websites are more likely to rank well and perform better in AI-driven search results like Google AI Overviews and ChatGPT answers. Is white label WordPress maintenance more cost-effective than hiring in-house? Yes. Most agencies save 50–70% compared to hiring internally. You get access to a full team without recruitment, training, or overhead costs. Can E2M help me win more clients or retain existing ones? Yes. Reliable WordPress maintenance services improve client retention, increase recurring revenue, and help you confidently take on more projects. Ready to Get Started? Book a Growth Call How Our White Label Partnership Works At E2M, the success of our operations can all be traced back to the process in place. Regardless of the White label service we provide, the name of the game is having a comprehensive understanding of your needs, direction, and goals with no gray areas throughout the entirety of the partnership. Here’s how E2M focused, step-by-step process works: 01 Inquiry You place an inquiry with us and give us the details of your requirements, with a brief idea of your objectives. We’re easy to reach– you can use the form below, email, Twitter or just pick up the phone and say Hi. We’re here 24x7 to answer your questions. 02 Kick-off Call In order to create a powerful content strategy for you, we need to get into the very DNA of your business. We will ask you lots of probing questions to find out more about your operations, your goals, your website, current sales, customers, and even staff. 03 Work Plan We aim to make every one of your potential customers aware of the benefits of your product and service. We’ll identify the platforms where they hang out and create the perfect plan to boost your presence on those platforms. 04 Execution We execute your projects through dedicated, multi-disciplinary white-label teams covering web development, design, SEO, paid media, content, and AI services. Your projects are delivered under your brand, aligned with your workflows, tools, timelines, and quality benchmarks. Each engagement is supported by defined processes, internal QA, and ongoing communication to ensure consistent delivery without adding operational overhead to your agency. You stay client-facing and in control. We stay focused on execution, accountability, and delivery at scale. 05 Results A brand presence on multiple channels is meaningless if it doesn’t get you ROI. We will tie back each promotion to growth objectives and pre-agreed KPIs, so that you have a definite and clear idea of where content marketing is taking you. 06 Success We base our success on the extent to which we helped your customers succeed. Our very identity is defined by our ability to get your name out there, build your brand, and keep growing together! Absolutely, you can pay by ACH. Just reach out to info@e2msolutions.com and let us know. You can also sign up for your first month using a credit card, and then switch to ACH or wire with help from your Account Manager. Can I set up automatic payment? Definitely. Just clarify with your account manager that you’d like to set up autopay and we’ll bill your account on the 1st of every month. Otherwise, your Account Manager will confirm with you before each charge. Is my payment information secure? Yes. All payments are processed through secure, PCI-compliant payment processors. We never store your full card details on our servers. What’s included in my plan hours? Your hours cover all project work, such as design, development, revisions, communication, and quality assurance. There are no hidden fees or surprise charges. Do unused hours roll over? Hours don’t roll over month to month. But if your workload shifts, you can scale your plan down and still keep the hours you didn’t use. Your Account Manager will make sure you’re getting the most out of your hours and that your plan fits your actual needs. What happens if I run out of hours in the middle of the month? Not a problem. Simply let your account manager know you’d like to re-up on hours with an early renewal. Commitment & Flexibility When does my plan start? Your plan activates immediately after checkout. You’ll receive an onboarding email within a few hours, and we can typically begin work within 24-48 hours. What is the cancellation policy? You can cancel your plan at any time. However, we do not provide refunds for any unused hours. What if I need to pause my plan? Not a problem. Let your account manager know you’d like to pause, and we’ll hold your plan. When your pipeline fills back up, you can resume without penalty. Can I change my plan later? Absolutely. You can upgrade, downgrade, or adjust your plan at any time. Just let your account manager know what you need, and we’ll make the change effective on your next billing cycle. Getting Started How quickly can we get started? Most agencies submit their first project within 24-48 hours of signing up. We’ll schedule an onboarding call to learn your preferences, set up tool access, and align on communication. What do I need to provide to get started? Just your preferred project management tools, communication preferences, and any brand guidelines or standards you’d like us to follow. We’ll handle the rest. Will I have a dedicated point of contact? Yes. You’ll be assigned a dedicated account manager and project manager who will know your agency, your clients, and your standards. Trust & Confidentiality Will you sign an NDA? NDAs come standard with every partnership. All project details, client information, and deliverables remain confidential. Do I own all the work you produce? 100%. Every file, design, and line of code we produce belongs to you. No hidden clauses, no licensing fees. We’ll get your explicit approval before using any 3rd party tools that require licensing fees or subscriptions. In most cases, you will contract directly with those third parties so that there are no issues with E2M dependencies after launch. Will my clients know I’m using a white label team? Never. We work as your invisible backend white label team. We never contact your clients directly, and all deliverables are branded as your agency’s work. × Hi, Khushbu here Let's connect! Absolutely, you can pay by ACH. Just reach out to info@e2msolutions.com and let us know. You can also sign up for your first month using a credit card, and then switch to ACH or wire with help from your Account Manager. Can I set up automatic payment? Definitely. Just clarify with your account manager that you’d like to set up autopay and we’ll bill your account on the 1st of every month. Otherwise, your Account Manager will confirm with you before each charge. Is my payment information secure? Yes. All payments are processed through secure, PCI-compliant payment processors. We never store your full card details on our servers. What’s included in my plan hours? Your hours cover all project work, such as design, development, revisions, communication, and quality assurance. There are no hidden fees or surprise charges. Do unused hours roll over? Hours don’t roll over month to month. But if your workload shifts, you can scale your plan down and still keep the hours you didn’t use. Your Account Manager will make sure you’re getting the most out of your hours and that your plan fits your actual needs. What happens if I run out of hours in the middle of the month? Not a problem. Simply let your account manager know you’d like to re-up on hours with an early renewal. Commitment & Flexibility When does my plan start? Your plan activates immediately after checkout. You’ll receive an onboarding email within a few hours, and we can typically begin work within 24-48 hours. What is the cancellation policy? You can cancel your plan at any time. However, we do not provide refunds for any unused hours. What if I need to pause my plan? Not a problem. Let your account manager know you’d like to pause, and we’ll hold your plan. When your pipeline fills back up, you can resume without penalty. Can I change my plan later? Absolutely. You can upgrade, downgrade, or adjust your plan at any time. Just let your account manager know what you need, and we’ll make the change effective on your next billing cycle. Getting Started How quickly can we get started? Most agencies submit their first project within 24-48 hours of signing up. We’ll schedule an onboarding call to learn your preferences, set up tool access, and align on communication. What do I need to provide to get started? Just your preferred project management tools, communication preferences, and any brand guidelines or standards you’d like us to follow. We’ll handle the rest. Will I have a dedicated point of contact? Yes. You’ll be assigned a dedicated account manager and project manager who will know your agency, your clients, and your standards. Trust & Confidentiality Will you sign an NDA? NDAs come standard with every partnership. All project details, client information, and deliverables remain confidential. Do I own all the work you produce? 100%. Every file, design, and line of code we produce belongs to you. No hidden clauses, no licensing fees. We’ll get your explicit approval before using any 3rd party tools that require licensing fees or subscriptions. In most cases, you will contract directly with those third parties so that there are no issues with E2M dependencies after launch. Will my clients know I’m using a white label team? Never. We work as your invisible backend white label team. We never contact your clients directly, and all deliverables are branded as your agency’s work. × Hi, Khushbu here Let's connect! Absolutely, you can pay by ACH. Just reach out to info@e2msolutions.com and let us know. You can also sign up for your first month using a credit card, and then switch to ACH or wire with help from your Account Manager. Can I set up automatic payment? Definitely. Just clarify with your account manager that you’d like to set up autopay and we’ll bill your account on the 1st of every month. Otherwise, your Account Manager will confirm with you before each charge. Is my payment information secure? Yes. All payments are processed through secure, PCI-compliant payment processors. We never store your full card details on our servers. What’s included in my plan hours? Your hours cover all project work, such as design, development, revisions, communication, and quality assurance. There are no hidden fees or surprise charges. Do unused hours roll over? Hours don’t roll over month to month. But if your workload shifts, you can scale your plan down and still keep the hours you didn’t use. Your Account Manager will make sure you’re getting the most out of your hours and that your plan fits your actual needs. What happens if I run out of hours in the middle of the month? Not a problem. Simply let your account manager know you’d like to re-up on hours with an early renewal. Commitment & Flexibility When does my plan start? Your plan activates immediately after checkout. You’ll receive an onboarding email within a few hours, and we can typically begin work within 24-48 hours. What is the cancellation policy? You can cancel your plan at any time. However, we do not provide refunds for any unused hours. What if I need to pause my plan? Not a problem. Let your account manager know you’d like to pause, and we’ll hold your plan. When your pipeline fills back up, you can resume without penalty. Can I change my plan later? Absolutely. You can upgrade, downgrade, or adjust your plan at any time. Just let your account manager know what you need, and we’ll make the change effective on your next billing cycle. Getting Started How quickly can we get started? Most agencies submit their first project within 24-48 hours of signing up. We’ll schedule an onboarding call to learn your preferences, set up tool access, and align on communication. What do I need to provide to get started? Just your preferred project management tools, communication preferences, and any brand guidelines or standards you’d like us to follow. We’ll handle the rest. Will I have a dedicated point of contact? Yes. You’ll be assigned a dedicated account manager and project manager who will know your agency, your clients, and your standards. Trust & Confidentiality Will you sign an NDA? NDAs come standard with every partnership. All project details, client information, and deliverables remain confidential. Do I own all the work you produce? 100%. Every file, design, and line of code we produce belongs to you. No hidden clauses, no licensing fees. We’ll get your explicit approval before using any 3rd party tools that require licensing fees or subscriptions. In most cases, you will contract directly with those third parties so that there are no issues with E2M dependencies after launch. Will my clients know I’m using a white label team? Never. We work as your invisible backend white label team. We never contact your clients directly, and all deliverables are branded as your agency’s work. × Hi, Khushbu here Let's connect! Absolutely, you can pay by ACH. Just reach out to info@e2msolutions.com and let us know. You can also sign up for your first month using a credit card, and then switch to ACH or wire with help from your Account Manager. Can I set up automatic payment? Definitely. Just clarify with your account manager that you’d like to set up autopay and we’ll bill your account on the 1st of every month. Otherwise, your Account Manager will confirm with you before each charge. Is my payment information secure? Yes. All payments are processed through secure, PCI-compliant payment processors. We never store your full card details on our servers. What’s included in my plan hours? Your hours cover all project work, such as design, development, revisions, communication, and quality assurance. There are no hidden fees or surprise charges. Do unused hours roll over? Hours don’t roll over month to month. But if your workload shifts, you can scale your plan down and still keep the hours you didn’t use. Your Account Manager will make sure you’re getting the most out of your hours and that your plan fits your actual needs. What happens if I run out of hours in the middle of the month? Not a problem. Simply let your account manager know you’d like to re-up on hours with an early renewal. Commitment & Flexibility When does my plan start? Your plan activates immediately after checkout. You’ll receive an onboarding email within a few hours, and we can typically begin work within 24-48 hours. What is the cancellation policy? You can cancel your plan at any time. However, we do not provide refunds for any unused hours. What if I need to pause my plan? Not a problem. Let your account manager know you’d like to pause, and we’ll hold your plan. When your pipeline fills back up, you can resume without penalty. Can I change my plan later? Absolutely. You can upgrade, downgrade, or adjust your plan at any time. Just let your account manager know what you need, and we’ll make the change effective on your next billing cycle. Getting Started How quickly can we get started? Most agencies submit their first project within 24-48 hours of signing up. We’ll schedule an onboarding call to learn your preferences, set up tool access, and align on communication. What do I need to provide to get started? Just your preferred project management tools, communication preferences, and any brand guidelines or standards you’d like us to follow. We’ll handle the rest. Will I have a dedicated point of contact? Yes. You’ll be assigned a dedicated account manager and project manager who will know your agency, your clients, and your standards. Trust & Confidentiality Will you sign an NDA? NDAs come standard with every partnership. All project details, client information, and deliverables remain confidential. Do I own all the work you produce? 100%. Every file, design, and line of code we produce belongs to you. No hidden clauses, no licensing fees. We’ll get your explicit approval before using any 3rd party tools that require licensing fees or subscriptions. In most cases, you will contract directly with those third parties so that there are no issues with E2M dependencies after launch. Will my clients know I’m using a white label team? Never. We work as your invisible backend white label team. We never contact your clients directly, and all deliverables are branded as your agency’s work. × Hi, Khushbu here Let's connect! Digital Marketing Agency · California, USA White Label SEO FAQs for Digital Agencies Understanding White Label SEO Services Services and Capabilities Working with Your White Label SEO Team Getting Started with E2M Understanding White Label SEO Services What are white label SEO services? White label SEO services let your agency offer search engine optimization under your own brand without building an in-house team. You partner with a white label company like E2M, and we handle strategy and execution behind the scenes. Your clients see polished work from your agency. You get the credit, the margins, and the client loyalty. Your clients come to you for SEO services. You own the relationship and set your pricing. Our team creates deliverables (audits, strategies, optimized content, reports) while your company gets the credit. The finished work shows up ready to present as your own. This model works for agencies at every stage. Boutique shops use white label services to offer SEO without hiring specialists. Established agencies use it to handle overflow and gain access to expertise they don’t have in-house. Growing agencies use it to scale without the risk and overhead of full-time hires. What’s the difference between white label SEO and traditional outsourcing? Traditional outsourcing usually means hiring freelancers or offshore teams for task-based work. You manage the relationship, chase deadlines, and hope the quality holds up. There’s often no strategic thinking involved. Just execute whatever you hand over. White label SEO is a different model. A white label SEO agency like E2M becomes your invisible backend team. We handle strategy, execution, and reporting as if we were part of your company. Your clients never know we exist. All deliverables go out under your brand with your company name on everything. The practical differences matter. Traditional outsourcing means managing multiple freelancers, dealing with inconsistent quality, and spending time coordinating work. E2M’s white label services provide a dedicated team, established processes, predictable quality, and direct communication through a single point of contact. Traditional outsourcing often comes with hourly billing that’s hard to predict. E2M offers flat monthly pricing that helps you protect your profit margins and price your offerings profitably. Traditional outsourcing rarely includes strategic support. A good white label SEO agency provides recommendations, identifies opportunities, and helps you deliver better client results. Not just complete tasks. Will my clients know I’m using a white label SEO team? They won’t have a clue. E2M works as your invisible backend team, and every piece of work we create fits right in with your agency and brand. We never contact your clients directly. All communication goes through you. We don’t put our company name or logo on any deliverables, documents, or reports. Everything we produce goes out under your brand. Our most effective agency partners set up a white label email address (e.g., seo@youragency.com ) for our team to use when logging into client accounts and tools. That way, even backend activity looks like it’s coming from your staff. Your clients see a polished agency with serious capabilities. You get the credit and the customer loyalty. We will never share or post your client work as our own. Do you sign an NDA to protect client information? Yes. NDAs come standard with every white label partnership. All project details, client information, and data stay confidential. We’ve spent 13 years building a reputation as the white label partner agencies trust with their most important client relationships. Beyond the legal side, our whole model depends on keeping things quiet. Your clients’ information stays protected, and your competitive advantage stays intact. Services and Capabilities What White Label SEO services does E2M offer? Our white label SEO services cover everything agencies need to help clients rank in traditional search and AI-powered platforms: Technical SEO: Site audits, crawlability analysis, Core Web Vitals optimization, site speed improvements, schema implementation, and technical fixes that improve search engine performance. On-Page Optimization: Keyword research, content optimization, meta tags, internal linking strategies, and on-page work that helps pages rank for target keywords. Local SEO: Google Business Profile optimization, local citation building, review management strategies, and local search services for clients with physical locations or service areas. eCommerce SEO: Product page optimization, category structure, platform-specific strategies for Shopify, WooCommerce, and BigCommerce, and technical SEO for online stores. AI Search Optimization: Optimization for AI Overviews, ChatGPT citations, Perplexity, and other AI-powered search platforms. This is becoming essential as more users get answers from AI rather than clicking through to websites. SEO Content Strategy & Creation: Blog writing, pillar pages, topic clusters, landing pages, and SEO-optimized content designed to build authority and drive organic traffic. Analytics, Reporting & ROI Tracking: GA4 setup and analysis, Google Search Console insights and Monthly branded reports showing rankings, traffic, and key metrics. Client-ready dashboards you can present directly. Our SEO team has executed over 50,000 campaigns for agencies, mostly across the US, Canada, the UK, and Australia in last 13 years. We handle the search activities work while you maintain client relationships and take credit for the results. Do you offer AI search optimization (GEO)? Yes. AI search optimization is one of our fastest-growing service areas. More people are using AI tools like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini to get answers instead of traditional Google searches. We help your clients show up in those AI-generated responses. Our White label GEO services include AI search audits, E-E-A-T optimization, content restructuring for AI visibility, schema implementation, and tracking citations across AI platforms. We optimize for Google AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Grok, Claude, and Bing Copilot. This gives your agency a competitive edge. You can offer AI search services alongside traditional SEO, positioning yourself as a forward-thinking partner while competitors are still catching up. What in White Label local SEO services do you provide? Our local SEO services cover everything agencies need to help clients dominate local search: Google Business Profile: Full setup, verification, and ongoing optimization including posts, photos, products, services, and events. Citation audit, cleanup, and building: Audit, cleanup, and building across high-authority directories. We fix NAP inconsistencies and get your clients listed where it counts. Local Content creation: Location-specific pages, locally-optimized blog content, and geo-targeted landing pages. What White label eCommerce SEO services do you offer? Our eCommerce SEO specialists understand the unique challenges of optimizing online stores: eCommerce Audits: In-depth analysis to identify product page SEO gaps, technical issues, and opportunities. Product & category page Optimization: Titles, descriptions, images, and schema to improve rankings and conversions. Category Structure: Optimized category pages and navigation that improve both SEO and user experience. Platform Expertise: Specialized strategies for Shopify, WooCommerce, and BigCommerce. AI Search for eCommerce: Optimization for product visibility in ChatGPT shopping features and AI-powered product discovery. We can audit existing SEO campaigns and provide strategic recommendations, or we can execute on a strategy your agency has already defined. Most agencies want both. Absolutely, you can pay by ACH. Just reach out to info@e2msolutions.com and let us know. You can also sign up for your first month using a credit card, and then switch to ACH or wire with help from your Account Manager. Can I set up automatic payment? Definitely.
